Task 2 — TechServices password reset link(s)
I found two recent password-reset emails. Here are the links and email details:

Notes and recommendation:
- The first email is from support@techservices.com (appears to be the official sender) and is likely the legitimate reset link. The second comes from an aol address and may be suspicious or a duplicate; treat it with caution.
- If you didn’t request a reset, don’t click the links. If you did, I recommend going directly to the official TechServices site (type the URL yourself) and initiating a password reset there, or using the link from support@techservices.com.
